verdicts.evidence: Item 4.02. Non-Reliance on Previously Issued Financial Statements
verdicts.no_ex_99_1_resolution: No EX-99.1 in archive; read primary 8-K body (rh-20230201x8k.htm). Filing is an Item 4.02 Non-Reliance announcement disclosing errors in EPS calculations from prior 10-K (FY ended Jan 29, 2022) and 10-Q (Q3 ended Oct 29, 2022); it is NOT an earnings release for any current quarter.
verdicts.reasoning: Filing is an Item 4.02 restatement/non-reliance disclosure, not an earnings press release; the body identifies prior-period errors (10-K FYE Jan 29, 2022 and 10-Q QE Oct 29, 2022) but does NOT report results for any current quarter, so no headline quarter can be matched against the corpus claim of Q4 FY2023.

verdicts.evidence: Aemetis Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results
verdicts.reasoning: Headline 'Aemetis Reports Second Quarter 2023 Financial Results' confirms Q2 FY2023; first sentence reaffirms 'three and six months ended June 30, 2023' — matches corpus claim Q2 FY2023.
Headline 'COMCAST REPORTS 3rd QUARTER 2023 RESULTS' confirms Q3 FY2023; first sentence reaffirms 'quarter ended September 30, 2023' — matches corpus claim Q3 FY2023.

verdicts.evidence: expects its results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025 to be in-line with or better than guidance
verdicts.no_ex_99_1_resolution: EX-99.1 is an internal layoff communication memo with no quarter headline. The 8-K body (fivn-20250331.htm) under Item 2.02 'Results of Operations and Financial Condition' explicitly references 'the quarter ended March 31, 2025' as the current reporting period — that's the authoritative period statement.
verdicts.reasoning: 8-K body Item 2.02 states the company expects 'results for the quarter ended March 31, 2025 to be in-line with or better than guidance' — this 8-K functions as a Q1 FY2025 preliminary/affirmation disclosure (alongside an Item 2.05 layoff), matching corpus claim Q1 FY2025.
